chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 122 of 2022 (Tariq Hayat Khan Versus Muhammad Anis Sakaria & others) Dated Order with signature of Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Justice Ms. Sana Akram Minhas Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at A 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 920/2022 (stay) Dated 22.04.2024 Barrister Faizan Hussain Memon for the Appellant M/s. Farhatullah and M. Ramish Farhat Advocates for the Respondent No.1 Mr. Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, AAG.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the Appellant after arguing the matter at length concedes that since now he has deposited the amount in terms of the Order dated 20.04.2022 of the Division Bench of this Court, he would make an attempt to file a fresh application in consideration of such deposit, which application may be dealt with without prejudice to the rights of the Respondents. The appeal with such understanding stands disposed of along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
